spx_data: SELECT date, open, high, low, close, volume, macd, signal, Upper_Band, Lower_Band, BB_Width, RSI_14, RSI_5, RSI_9, EMA_50, EMA_200, average_true_range, adx, bull_market, drawdown FROM finntech.daily_indeces_curated_dev.spx WHERE date >= '2025-01-01' AND date <= '2026-03-15'
ndx_data: SELECT date, open, high, low, close, volume, macd, signal, Upper_Band, Lower_Band, BB_Width, RSI_14, RSI_5, RSI_9, EMA_50, EMA_200, average_true_range, adx, bull_market, drawdown FROM finntech.daily_indeces_curated_dev.ndx WHERE date >= '2025-01-01' AND date <= '2026-03-15'
vix_data: SELECT date, close as vix_close FROM finntech.daily_indeces_curated_dev.vix WHERE date >= '2025-01-01' AND date <= '2026-03-15'
